mapper.select: SELECT ap.activity_id AS activityId, ap.participation_status AS participationStatus, ap.activity_date AS activityDate, ac.activity_name AS activityName, ac.location AS location, ac.start_time AS startTime, ac.end_time AS endTime FROM activity_participation ap JOIN activity_schedule ac ON ap.activity_id = ac.id WHERE ap.elder_id = #{elderId} AND ap.activity_date = #{date} ORDER BY ac.start_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO activity_participation (elder_id, activity_id, participation_status, created_at, activity_date_start, activity_date_end, activity_date) VALUES (#{elderId}, #{activityId}, #{participationStatus}, #{createdAt}, #{activityDateStart}, #{activityDateEnd}, #{activityDate})
